meaning: vt.猛击,用力打下去,重拍n.用劲打击,长打,全垒打 [军] Special Warfare Armored Transporter,特种战争装甲运输车
examples: It seems that they have left Swat.
Pakistani soldiers have cleared much of the Swat valley and surrounding areas but they say there are still pockets of resistance.
First, we have to clear up Swat because that's very important for the military and the government—to bring this operation to a logical conclusion.
Unlike FBI SWAT teams that train several days a month, the hostage team preps full time.
"The Raid" from Indonesia combines SWAT-team-versus-gangster slaughter with a discipline of martial arts called silat.
